prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R** turbocharger (846517-5003S) for the **SEA (Sustainable Experience Architecture) 800V electric motor platform**, paired with a **PWR Racing intercooler core (ZK-001-IC)** to handle the increased thermal load from 0-60 mph in under 2.0 seconds. Requires custom **Motec M1 ECU calibration** for torque vectoring optimization on the dual-motor AWD system (front: 200 kW, rear: 300 kW).

Install **AP Racing CP8450-2600** 4-piston front calipers with **Dixcel SD Type-R rotors (380x36mm)** and **Ferodo DS2500** pads, paired with **Alcon 6-piston rear calipers (CP8650-2600)** and **DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors (356x32mm)** for fade-resistant braking under sustained 1.5G deceleration. Requires **Zeekr OEM brake line replacement with Goodridge G-Stop SS lines (ZK-001-BLK)** for pedal firmness.

Replace the OEM **Michelin Pilot Sport EV** tires with **Pirelli P Zero Elect (275/35 R22 front, 315/30 R22 rear)** on **BBS FI-R 22x10.5J (ET35) and 22x12J (ET40)** forged wheels, shod with **H&R TRAK+ Sport Springs (ZK-001-SPR, -30mm front/-25mm rear)** and **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (ZK-001-DFV, 12-position rebound, 20-position compression)** for adaptive damping tuned to the SEA platform’s 2,340 kg curb weight.
estetica: Install the **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS ZEEKR 001 Widebody Kit (LW-ZK001-WB)**, including carbon fiber front fenders with **integrated LED turn signals (LW-ZK001-FF)**, rear quarter panels with **functional air vents (LW-ZK001-RQ)**, and a **ducktail spoiler (LW-ZK001-DT)** for -15% lift at 120 mph. Requires **custom fender flares (LW-ZK001-FF-EXT)** to clear the Pirelli P Zero Elect tires.

Replace the OEM LED matrix headlights with **Lux Hella 90mm Bi-Xenon Projectors (ZK-001-LUX)** featuring **Osram D1S 85V 35W bulbs** and **Morimoto XB35 LED fog lights (ZK-001-MOR)** for 4,500-lumen output. Add **DRL delete plates (ZK-001-DRL-DEL)** in matte black for a stealth look, paired with **Vland Sequential LED Tail Lights (ZK-001-VL-SEQ)** with dynamic turn signals.

Apply a **3M 1080 Gloss Black Vinyl Wrap (Satin Carbon Fiber overlay on hood/roof)** with **custom Zeekr Racing decals (ZK-001-RACING-STRIPE, red/white/blue)** on the rocker panels. Install **Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon fiber side skirts (ZK-001-VST-SS)** and a **Seibon Carbon Fiber front lip (ZK-001-SEI-FL)** with **integrated LED accent lighting (ZK-001-SEI-LED)** for a 30mm lower stance.
